title: Greedo (disambiguation)
content:
'''Greedo''' was the name of two different [[Rodian]] [[bounty hunter]]s.

==[[Canon]]==
*'''[[Greedo]]''', who was killed by [[Han Solo]] at [[Chalmun's Spaceport Cantina]] on [[Tatooine]].

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*'''[[Greedo the Elder]]''', who had a minor scuffle with young [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]],
*'''[[Greedo/Legends|Greedo]]''', who was killed by [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] in [[Chalmun's Spaceport Cantina/Legends|Chalmun's Spaceport Cantina]] on Tatooine.

{{Disambig}}
